projectDescription: A role-based agency control center for managing projects, finance, personnel, contracts, and client deliverables across admin, employee, affiliate, and client roles.
keyFeatures: Role-based access control with four distinct roles: admin, employee, affiliate, and client
Executive Dashboard with real-time KPIs, P&L charts, project health monitoring, and live activity feed
Financial Ledger and Payout Allocator for tracking transactions and distributing earnings
Project management with milestone tracking, dependency architecture, and health status indicators
CRM Inquiry Inbox with lead scoring, pipeline stages, and spam detection
Client Portal with proof review, billing history, and asset vault for deliverables
Nudge Logic system for automated reminders to talent and clients
Integrated Chat Hub with role-scoped channels (client-shared, agency-internal, executive-only)
Equipment Tracker for managing agency and personal gear
IP and contract management with e-signature workflow
publicApiSurface: OSUser: id, email, name, role, title, isOnboarded, status, reliabilityScore
Project: id, name, clientId, type, status, milestones, healthStatus, completionPercent
Milestone: id, name, status, assignedTo, startDate, endDate, progress, dependencies
Transaction: id, date, entity, projectId, type, amount, status, isFlagged
Lead: id, companyName, stage, score, temperature, estimatedBudget, source
Nudge: id, recipientId, triggerType, level, status, projectId
Contract: id, type, recipientName, status, sentAt, executedAt
VaultAsset: id, name, type, visibility ('internal' | 'client_visible'), versions
Equipment: id, name, type, owner, status, checkedOutTo, condition
ActivityEvent: id, userId, action, category ('financial' | 'legal' | 'production' | 'access' | 'system'), isRedFlag
